title: cheilanthes marsupianthes
intro: Cheilanthes marsupianthes, also known as the Australian fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cheilanthes marsupianthes include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal treatment.
